g.text: LabHire System Architecture (Components, Services, Data, and External Integrations)
- Admin login via DB-assigned accounts (FR-021, C-004)
- Sends verification codes to university & enterprise emails (AD-001, FR-010, FR-012)
- Student applies to projects; mentor screens (FR-009)
- Collaborative filtering, tag matching, cold-start rules (FR-001, AD-004)
- Personal info & resume upload with permissions (FR-011, FR-013, FR-015)
- Referral posts by enterprise-certified students only (FR-016..FR-019, FR-017, C-007)
- Popularity = likes, comments, views, time decay (FR-020)
- Auto field validation + manual review within 72h (FR-022)
- In-site messages & email push for favorites, replies, applications, review feedback (FR-007, AD-003)
- Chat content must be encrypted (FR-005, NFR-004)
System scope limited to university research internship information and community referral posts.
Excludes social enterprise recruitment and headhunting ads (C-001).
Database products, API protocols, and encryption algorithms are not specified by the SRS (AD-005).
Actors: Student, Enterprise-Certified Student, Mentor, Administrator
Client Layer: Web/Mobile UI for students & mentors, Admin Console
API Edge: API Gateway + Edge Security (rate limiting, CAPTCHA)
Services: Auth/IAM, Profile/Resume, Project, Application, Evaluation,
Review & Certification, Notification, Chat, Admin Management, Risk Control
Data: Core DB, Cache, Search Index, Resume Object Storage, Event Bus, Audit Logs
External: Email Service Provider, optional SMS Provider
